BOYS AND GIRLS CLUB OF DURHAM AND ORANGE

ExplnOfNonFilingWithAGStmt.ExplanationTxt: PUBLIC INSPECTION REQUIREMENTS ARE WAIVED IN YEAR OF TERMINATION

LiquidationExplanationStmt.ExplanationTxt: THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES ADOPTED A PLAN OF LIQUIDATION IN 2015 IN COMPLIANCE WITH SECTION 507(B)(1)(A) TERMINATIONS. FROM 2015 THROUGH 2020, THE FOUNDATION CONTINUED TO MAKE OUTRIGHT AND CHALLENGE GRANTS IN CONJUNCTION WITH PROJECTIONS AND A SPEND DOWN PLAN TO LIQUIDATE THE FUND BY 2020/2021. FINAL CHALLENGE GRANTS WERE MADE IN 2020 AND PAID OUT IN 2021. $2,988,806 (ALL CASH) WAS LEFT TO DISTRIBUTE TO SECTION 509(A)(1) QUALIFIED PUBLIC CHARITIES AS LIQUIDATING DISTRIBUTIONS (SEE STATEMENT 12). THERE WERE NO OTHER ASSETS IN THE FOUNDATION AND ALL OPERATIONS CEASED WHEN THE CASH WAS DISTRIBUTED.

OtherDecreasesDetail.Desc: DISTRIBUTION OF TRUST ASSETS IN LIQUIDATION
